scripts.start: concurrently --kill-others --prefix-colors "cyan,yellow,magenta,green" --names "git-analyst,code-explainer,pg-dev,assistant" "node git-analyst/dist/server.js --http --port=3010" "node code-explainer/dist/server.js --http --port=3011" "node pg-dev-server/dist/server.js --http --port=3012" "npm run dev --prefix coding-assistant"
